title: helichrysum rupestre
intro: Helichrysum rupestre, also known as the Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum rupestre can be prepared into various herbal forms, including essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used to support overall well-being and health.
